keyword.name: prior

keyword.label: Specifies the full matrix format when specifying a user-specified proposal covariance.

keyword.name: matrix
keyword.label: Specifies the full matrix format when importing a user-specified proposal covariance.

keyword.name: seed
keyword.label: Seed of the random number generator

keyword.name: misc_options
keyword.label: Set method options not available through Dakota spec

keyword.name: mutation_range
keyword.label: Set uniform offset control for discrete parameters

keyword.name: collocation_points_sequence
keyword.label: Sequence of collocation point counts used in a multi-stage expansion

keyword.label: Export the coefficients and multi-index of a Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) to a file

keyword.label: Sequence of collocation point counts used in a multi-stage expansion

keyword.name: tensor_grid
keyword.label: Use sub-sampled tensor-product quadrature points to build a polynomial chaos expansion.
keyword.default: regression with LHS sample set (point collocation)

keyword.name: reuse_points
keyword.label: This describes the behavior of reuse of points in constructing polynomial chaos expansion models.
keyword.default: no sample reuse in coefficient estimation

keyword.name: uniform
keyword.label: Refine an expansion uniformly in all dimensions.

keyword.name: dimension_adaptive
keyword.label: Perform anisotropic expansion refinement by preferentially adapting in dimensions that are detected to have higher "importance".

keyword.name: sobol
keyword.label: Estimate dimension preference for automated refinement of stochastic expansion using total Sobol' sensitivity indices.

keyword.name: decay
keyword.label: Estimate spectral coefficient decay rates to guide dimension-adaptive refinement.

keyword.name: generalized
keyword.label: Use the generalized sparse grid dimension adaptive algorithm to refine a sparse grid approximation of stochastic expansion.

keyword.name: least_squares
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion using least squares

keyword.name: svd
keyword.label: Calculate the coefficients of a polynomial chaos expansion using the singular value decomposition.

keyword.name: equality_constrained
keyword.label: Calculate the coefficients of a polynomial chaos expansion using equality constrained least squares.

keyword.name: orthogonal_matching_pursuit
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion using orthogonal matching pursuit (OMP)

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: The noise tolerance used when performing cross validation in the presence of noise or truncation errors.
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: basis_pursuit
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion by solving the Basis Pursuit L1 -minimization problem using linear programming.

keyword.name: basis_pursuit_denoising
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion by solving the Basis Pursuit Denoising L1 -minimization problem using second order cone optimization.

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: The noise tolerance used when performing cross validation in the presence of noise or truncation errors.
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: least_angle_regression
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion by using the greedy least angle regression (LAR) method.

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: The noise tolerance used when performing cross validation in the presence of noise or truncation errors.
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: least_absolute_shrinkage
keyword.label: Compute the coefficients of a polynomial expansion by using the LASSO problem.

keyword.name: noise_tolerance
keyword.label: The noise tolerance used when performing cross validation in the presence of noise or truncation errors.
keyword.default: 1e-3 for BPDN, 0. otherwise (algorithms run until termination)

keyword.name: l2_penalty
keyword.label: The :math:`l_2` pentalty used when performing compressed sensing with elastic net.

keyword.name: noise_only
keyword.label: Restrict the cross validation process to estimating only the best noise tolerance.

keyword.name: max_cv_order_candidates
keyword.label: Limit the number of cross-validation candidates for basis order

keyword.name: ratio_order
keyword.label: Specify a non-linear the relationship between the expansion order of a polynomial chaos expansion and the number of samples that will be used to compute the PCE coefficients.

keyword.name: response_scaling
keyword.label: Perform bounds-scaling on response values prior to surrogate emulation
